name: Grande Comore (Comoros)

colors.symbolism: the crescent and the four stars

description: A blue field bearing a white crescent and four white five-pointed stars arranged vertically.
history: Grande Comore (Ngazidja) is the largest of the three autonomous islands of the Union of the Comoros and the site of the national capital, Moroni. Its flag shows the white crescent and four stars of the Comoros on a blue field.

features.role: four stars for the islands of the Comoros
